name: preview_click
description: Click exactly one page target. Prefer locator with a Playwright selector such as role=button[name='Send']; selector accepts legacy CSS; x and y are viewport CSS pixels and must be supplied together. Call preview_snapshot first when the target is unknown.

selector.description: Legacy CSS selector such as button[type='submit']. Prefer locator for resilient role/text targeting.

locator.description: Playwright selector, preferably role/text based, for example role=button[name='Send'] or text=Continue. Use snapshot first to inspect the page.

allOf.description: Viewport-relative X coordinate in CSS pixels. Must be paired with y.
Viewport-relative Y coordinate in CSS pixels. Must be paired with x.
Maximum wait in milliseconds. Defaults to 15000; maximum 60000.

timeoutMs.description: Maximum wait in milliseconds. Defaults to 15000; maximum 60000.
